meaning: adj.易怒的,暴躁的,带怒气的,倔强的
examples: So pretty soon there were these two peevish boys sitting in her white 1959 Oldsmobile on their way to Detroit Public Library.
Aubrey had slept little and that always made him peevish.
She glared down at me with a peevish expression on her face.
While Steve Jobs is certainly capable of being peevish and capricious, his criticisms have the ring of truth.
Obama spoke with confidence, optimism and grace, avoiding that peevish self pity he is prone to.
